_comment: Example research plan for scripts/research-plan-runner.mjs. Two narrow sub-tasks (each ~3 file reads + a short bullet list) followed by a synthesis. End-to-end wall on Codex is typically 5-8 min. Reproduce with: node scripts/research-plan-runner.mjs examples/research-plans/quickstart-runtime-driver-survey.json --provider codex

subTasks.instruction: Read src/runtime/codex-runtime-adapter.ts (focus on the run() method and the resolveDispatchRuntimeConfig() helper). Produce a 4-bullet summary of what the driver does on each run() entry, including the persona-settings hot-swap pathway. End your reply with the literal line: codex-driver-survey-OK

Read src/runtime/claude-agent-runtime-adapter.ts (focus on the run() method and the resolveDispatchSettings() helper). Produce a 4-bullet summary of what the driver does on each run() entry, including the persona-settings hot-swap pathway. End your reply with the literal line: claude-agent-driver-survey-OK
